chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-748 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.10.2022 Mr. Prem Chand Khatri, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh along-with SIP Talib Hussain Jat P.S Sanghar. == Through instant constitutional petition, the petitioners seek restraining order against respondents No.4 & 5 from harassing them at the behest of private respondents and to issue direction to official respondents to provide them legal protection. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh denied the allegations leveled in the petition and stated that official respondents will act strictly in accordance with law rather on the whims and wishes of anyone, as alleged in the present petition. In view of this statement of learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh instant petition stands disposed of. However, it is made clear that every action of the respondents shall be subject to law and police shall not act at the behest of any influential person. JUDGE Muhammad Danish
